User.title: User
User.description: Represents a registered user of the CeyRaa platform, storing basic profile information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The user's email address, used for login and communication.

displayName.description: The name of the user as it should be displayed on the platform.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user's profile was last updated.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Defines a product category for organizing and filtering products.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

name.description: The name of the product category (e.g., 'Dresses', 'Footwear').

slug.description: A URL-friendly, unique identifier for the category.

description.description: A brief description of the category.

imageUrl.description: URL for an image representing the category, if applicable.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a single product available for sale, including its core information and pricing.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

slug.description: A URL-friendly, unique identifier for the product.

description.description: A detailed description of the product.

basePrice.description: The original price of the product before any discounts.

discountedPrice.description: The current discounted price of the product, if applicable. If no discount, this might be null or same as basePrice.

isFeatured.description: Indicates if the product is marked as a featured item.

isNewArrival.description: Indicates if the product is a new arrival.

categoryIds.description: References to Category entities. (Relationship: Category N:N Product)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was added to the catalog.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product information was last updated.

ProductVariant.title: ProductVariant
ProductVariant.description: Represents a specific color variant of a product, linking to its unique images and available sizes.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ProductVariant entity.

productId.description: Reference to the parent Product. (Relationship: Product 1:N ProductVariant)

colorName.description: The name of the color variant (e.g., 'Midnight Black', 'Pearl White').

colorHex.description: The hexadecimal code for the color, used for UI swatches (e.g., '#0A0A0A').

imageIds.description: References to Image entities specifically for this product variant. (Relationship: Image N:N ProductVariant)

SizeVariant.title: SizeVariant
SizeVariant.description: Represents a specific size and its stock quantity for a given product color variant.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SizeVariant entity.

productVariantId.description: Reference to the parent ProductVariant. (Relationship: ProductVariant 1:N SizeVariant)

size.description: The size of the product variant (e.g., 'S', 'M', 'L', 'EU38', 'US7').

stock.description: The current quantity of this specific size variant in stock.

Image.title: Image
Image.description: Stores details about an image, primarily used for product display.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Image entity.

url.description: The URL where the image is hosted.

altText.description: Alternative text for the image, important for accessibility.

width.description: The width of the image in pixels.

height.description: The height of the image in pixels.

sortOrder.description: An integer indicating the display order of the image within a gallery or list.

Cart.title: Cart
Cart.description: Represents a user's shopping cart, containing items they intend to purchase.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Cart entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this cart. (Relationship: User 1:N Cart)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated (e.g., items added/removed).

CartItem.title: CartItem
CartItem.description: Represents a single product item with a specific size and quantity within a user's shopping cart.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CartItem entity.

cartId.description: Reference to the parent Cart. (Relationship: Cart 1:N CartItem)

productVariantId.description: Reference to the specific ProductVariant (color) added to the cart.

sizeVariantId.description: Reference to the specific SizeVariant (size and stock) added to the cart.

quantity.description: The number of units of this specific item in the cart.

priceAtAddition.description: The price of the item when it was added to the cart, useful for tracking price changes.

isSelectedForCheckout.description: Indicates if this item is selected by the user to proceed to checkout.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a completed or in-progress purchase made by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who placed the order. (Relationship: User 1:N Order)

orderDate.description: Timestamp when the order was placed.

totalAmount.description: The total monetary amount of the order, including all items, taxes, and shipping.

status.description: The current status of the order (e.g., 'Pending', 'Processing', 'Shipped', 'Delivered', 'Cancelled').

paymentMethod.description: The method used for payment (e.g., 'Bank Transfer', 'Stripe').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order record was created in the system.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order record was last updated (e.g., status change).

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Represents a specific item included in a placed order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderItem entity.

orderId.description: Reference to the parent Order. (Relationship: Order 1:N OrderItem)

productId.description: Reference to the Product purchased in this order item.

productVariantId.description: Reference to the specific ProductVariant (color) purchased.

sizeVariantId.description: Reference to the specific SizeVariant (size) purchased.

quantity.description: The quantity of this specific item purchased in the order.

priceAtPurchase.description: The price at which this item was purchased (includes any discounts applied at the time).

Banner.title: Banner
Banner.description: Represents a promotional banner displayed on the homepage, which can be interactive or static.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Banner entity.

title.description: The main title text for the banner.

description.description: A brief description or subtitle for the banner.

imageUrl.description: URL of the image to display in the banner.

videoUrl.description: Optional URL of a video to display in the banner instead of an image.

linkUrl.description: The URL to navigate to when the banner's call-to-action is clicked.

callToActionText.description: Text for the call-to-action button displayed on the banner.

type.description: The type of banner, either 'Navigational' (clickable) or 'Static' (informational).

isActive.description: Indicates if the banner is currently active and should be displayed.

sortOrder.description: An integer defining the display order of banners on the homepage.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the banner was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the banner information was last updated.

definition.description: Stores individual user profiles. Each user's document ID matches their Firebase Authentication UID.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication User ID (UID) of the user.
